# <Type>: <Subject> (Max 50 chars)

# Body (Max 72 chars per line, detailed explanation of WHAT and WHY)

# Footer
# <FooterType>: #<IssueNumber>

# --- COMMIT MESSAGE GUIDE ---
# Types
# Feat     : New feature
# Fix      : Bug fix or typo
# Refactor : Code refactoring
# Design   : UI design changes
# Comment  : Adding or modifying comments
# Style    : Code formatting (no logic change)
# Test     : Test code changes
# Chore    : Miscellaneous (build scripts, assets, etc.)
# Init     : Project initialization
# Rename   : Renaming files/folders
# Remove   : Deleting files
#
# Subject Rules
# - No periods/special symbols at end
# - Capitalize first letter
# - Imperative mood (e.g., "Add feature" not "Added feature")
#
# Footer Types
# Fixes       : Issue in progress
# Resolves    : Issue resolved
# Ref         : Reference
# Related to  : Related issue (not resolved yet)
#
# Note
# - Always write in English
# - For PRs, provide title and body as copy-pasteable code blocks
# (user creates PRs on GitHub web, NOT via gh CLI)
